notes: RUN34: ISO Short Drawdown Mitigation. 18 coins, 366 days. $100/coin/day reset. RISK=10% LEVERAGE=5x FEE=0.1%/side SLIP=0.05%/side. Tests: circuit breaker (N consec SLs → X-bar cooldown), ISO-specific SL widening (0.5%, 0.8%, 1.5%, signal-only), combined, and ISO kill. Complement strategies INCLUDED. Scalp/Momentum EXCLUDED.
